# GitHub Assets

This directory contains visual assets used by GitHub for this repository.

## Social Preview Image

`social-preview.png` — the image displayed when this repository is shared on social media (Twitter/X, LinkedIn, Slack, etc.).

**To update the live social preview on GitHub:**

1. Go to **Settings → Social preview** in the repository
2. Click **Edit**
3. Upload the latest `social-preview.png` from this directory
4. Click **Set social preview**

**Recommended dimensions:** 1280 × 640 px (minimum 640 × 320 px)
